title: More Detectors
description:
Minecraft更多矿物探测器模组，方便玩家寻找矿物
More Detector mods for Minecraft, making it easier for players to find minerals
body:
Minecraft更多矿物探测器模组，方便玩家寻找矿物
玩家可以使用探测器寻找矿物，铁探测器可以找到铁矿和深层铁矿以及煤矿，后续会考虑加上深层煤矿，钻石探测器可以找到钻石矿和深层钻石矿，铜探测器可以找到铜矿以及铜块，还有最新加入的试炼刷怪笼
More Detector mods for Minecraft, making it easier for players to find minerals
Players can use the Detector to find minerals, the Iron Detector to find Iron Ore and Deep Iron Ore and Coal, and the Diamond Detector to find Diamond Ore and Deep Diamond Ore, the Copper Detector to find Copper Ore and Copper Blocks, and the latest addition to the Trials Spawner
